dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HRES 1274 RH: Providing that section 11 of House Resolution 1224 shall have no force or effect.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Fischbach, from the Committee on Rules, reported the following resolution; which was referred to the House Calendar and ordered to be printed

form.official-title: Providing that section 11 of House Resolution 1224 shall have no force or effect.

section.text: That section 11 of House Resolution 1224 shall have no force or effect.

endorsement.action-desc: Referred to the House Calendar and ordered to be printed
